questions.sentence: As a web project grows, you often need to run repetitive tasks like starting a development server, building the project for production, or running tests.
In a Node.js project, you can automate these tasks using 'NPM Scripts' defined in the 'scripts' section of your 'package.json' file.
Each script is a command you can run in your terminal.
For example, a common script is '"start": "vite"', which allows you to start the server by typing 'npm start'.
By using NPM scripts, you can keep your development workflow consistent and easy for new team members to learn.
It also allows you to integrate your project with automated build and deployment tools.
